signs_description: Tithandizeni kuyika Zizindikiro izi za Bitcoin ku America konse!
signs_title: Zizindikiro za Bitcoin zaulere kuchokera ku bitcoin.rocks
signs_choose_header: ZIKOMO POTHANDIZA KUYIKA ZIZINDIKIRO IZI ZA BITCOIN KU AMERICA KONSE!
signs_choose_c1: Tsopano tatha zizindikiro kwathunthu! Cholinga chathu ndi kufulumizitsa kugwiritsiridwa ntchito kwa Bitcoin kudzera mu maphunziro.
signs_choose_c2: Ambiri anu munathandiza poyika zizindikiro izi za Bitcoin zaulere poyera. Zizindikiro zathu zonse zili ndi ma QR code omwe amalumikizana ndi tsamba lophunzitsa za
signs_choose_c4: Chifukwa cha gulu lathu lodabwitsa, tinafika kwa anthu masauzande ndi kuwathandiza kuyamba ulendo wawo wa Bitcoin.
signs_share_c1: Gawanani chithunzi cha malo anu a zizindikiro nafe pa Nostr ndipo muone kumene anthu ena akuyika zizindikiro zawo.
signs_instructions_1: Lembani adilesi yanu ndipo tikutumizani bokosi la zizindikiro 10 za Bitcoin mu kalata!
signs_instructions_2: Deta ya adilesi imachotsedwa zizindikiro zanu zaulere zikatumizidwa.
